---
title: "test_fix_muninn_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_fix_muninn_empire.py"
loc: 22
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.50
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.32
---

## Intent
The `test_fix_muninn_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_standardize_muninn. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_standardize_muninn. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [scripts.fix_muninn](file://scripts.fix_muninn)

### Exports
- `test_standardize_muninn`
